prompt: The Optional is unwrapped without checking, causing NoSuchElementException. What is the bug?
choices: max() returns null instead of Optional for empty streams
Calling Optional.get() on an empty Optional throws NoSuchElementException; always check isPresent() or use orElse() first
Integer::compareTo is not a valid Comparator for max()
Empty streams always throw an exception in terminal operations
explanation: stream().max() returns Optional.empty() when the stream has no elements. Calling get() on an empty Optional throws NoSuchElementException. Fix: max.orElse(-1) or max.ifPresent(System.out::println) or max.orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new).
